events.title: US and Iran Exchange Strikes After Tanker Attacks in Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: The US military reported hitting missile sites and command centers in response to Iran's attacks on commercial vessels. Iran stated it attacked US bases, escalating tensions in the strategically vital Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: Trump Threatens Further Strikes on Iran Amid 'Fearless' Response Warning
events.desc: US President Trump indicated potential further strikes against Iran, stating they would be swift. This follows Iran's warning of a 'fearless' response, signaling a dangerous escalation following recent hostilities.

events.title: US Issues Fresh Iran-Related Sanctions After Strait of Hormuz Attacks
events.desc: The US Treasury Department imposed new sanctions on a key financier for Iran's Supreme Leader and 13 other individuals and entities. This action follows Iran's renewed attacks on oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz.

events.title: US Demands Iran Public Pledge to Halt Hormuz Strait Attacks
events.desc: Senior US officials are insisting Iran publicly commit to ceasing attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz and ensuring all lanes are open. Iran has historically resisted relinquishing control over this critical oil transit route.

events.title: Iran Supreme Leader Vows Revenge for Father's Killing
events.desc: Iran's Supreme Leader pledged revenge for the 'US-Israeli killing' of his father and predecessor. This statement comes after President Trump warned against any assassination attempts on him.

events.title: US Seeks Iranian Pledge for Safe Passage Through Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: Iran's Foreign Minister is in Oman for talks on safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz. The US is seeking a public commitment from Iran to ensure free and secure transit for ships.

events.title: US Democrat Ro Khanna Detained by Israeli Settlers in West Bank
events.desc: US Representative Ro Khanna reported being detained by Israeli settlers armed with US-made rifles during a visit to the West Bank. He described the incident as an unfiltered look at the occupation.

events.title: Headteacher Among Four Killed in Deadliest Israeli Attack on Lebanon Since Ceasefire
events.desc: Lebanese state media reported that a headteacher and three others were killed in an Israeli strike while travelling in a car. This marks the deadliest attack since the recent ceasefire.

events.title: Palestinians Mourn Gaza World Cup Screenings Organizer Killed in Israeli Strike
events.desc: Mohammed al-Wahidi, an aid worker who had become a prominent humanitarian figure during the conflict, was killed in an Israeli strike in Gaza. He was known for organizing World Cup screenings.

events.title: Bomb Explosions Injure 18 in Damascus During Macron's Visit
events.desc: Multiple bomb explosions occurred in Damascus, injuring 18 people. The incidents happened while French President Macron was reportedly meeting with the Syrian president.

events.title: Power Cuts Plunge Gaza Hospitals into Darkness Amid Israeli Attacks
events.desc: Gaza is experiencing severe power outages, critically impacting hospitals that are struggling to treat patients amidst ongoing Israeli attacks.

events.title: Russian Missile and Drone Barrage Kills Two and Wounds 19 in Ukraine
events.desc: Russia launched a barrage of ballistic missiles and drones targeting Kyiv, resulting in two deaths and 19 injuries. This attack is part of a significant escalation in hostilities.
